# Excludes for copying this repo into a sealed in-loop Codex workspace.
#
# Keep deterministic harness code, protocol contracts, public data manifests,
# current research state, specs, submissions, ledgers, and confirmation results.
# Exclude local operator material, generated files, large artifacts, and
# historical development docs that are not part of the in-loop research surface.

.git/
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
.DS_Store
.Rhistory
.pytest_cache/
.mypy_cache/
.ipynb_checkpoints/

artifacts/
locks/active_run.lock
repomix-output.md

docs/AUTORESEARCH_ADAPTATION_REVIEW.md
docs/CLOSED_LOOP_READINESS_ROADMAP.md
docs/DEBATE_LAUNCH_SCOPE_AND_AUTONOMY.md
docs/DEEP_RESEARCH_FOLLOWUP.md
docs/DEEP_RESEARCH_PROMPT.md
docs/IMPLEMENTATION_INDEX.md
docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
docs/PILOT_BENCHMARK_3090.md
docs/codepacks/
docs/repo-dev/

CLAUDE.md
